# J.U.T.A. — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A full-service facility management company based in Munich, offering a comprehensive range of property upkeep solutions. The business handles everything from minor repairs and garden care to thorough indoor and outdoor cleaning, while also acting as a professional intermediary between property management companies (Hausverwaltung) and third-party service providers. The company positions itself as a reliable all-in-one partner for property-related needs, covering inspections, controls, and any additional tasks typical in facility management.

---

## Pages

### Startseite
https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app
Suchen Sie einen verlässlichen Partner für Facility Management in München? J.U.T.A. bietet Ihnen alles aus einer Hand: von Reinigung bis Gartenpflege. Jetzt unverbindlich anfragen!

### Leistungen
https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/services
Entdecken Sie unser komplettes Leistungsspektrum: Reparaturen, Reinigung innen &amp; außen, Gartenpflege und mehr. Wir sind Ihr Partner für integrierte Facility Services in München.

### Über uns
https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/about
Mehr als nur ein Dienstleister: Erfahren Sie, wie J.U.T.A. als persönlicher Partner zwischen Hausverwaltung und Handwerkern für reibungslose Abläufe an Ihrem Objekt sorgt.

### Kontakt
https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/contact
Bereit für ein gepflegtes Objekt ohne Aufwand? Kontaktieren Sie J.U.T.A. für ein persönliches Angebot im Facility Management. Wir kümmern uns um den Rest – garantiert!

### Danke | J.U.T.A.
https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/contact/thank-you

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About J.U.T.A.
A full-service facility management company based in Munich, offering a comprehensive range of property upkeep solutions. The business handles everything from minor repairs and garden care to thorough indoor and outdoor cleaning, while also acting as a professional intermediary between property management companies (Hausverwaltung) and third-party service providers. The company positions itself as a reliable all-in-one partner for property-related needs, covering inspections, controls, and any additional tasks typical in facility management.

## Target Audience
- Property owners, Hausverwaltung (property management companies), businesses in Munich
- Property Owners in Munich
- Munich Hausverwaltung Companies
- Corporate Facility Managers

## Industry
Facility Management

---

- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://j-u-t-a-8cd24f80.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
